item_name: Hercules GSP38WB PLUS Wall Guitar Hangers - Pair

data.name: Set of 2 Hercules Stands GSP38WB PLUS Wall Guitar Hangers

terms: Hercules GSP38WB Plus wall guitar stand
Hercules wall mount guitar stand wood base

data.pool_size: Good pool. Used singles $17-25 Reverb, $20-25 eBay. 2-pack comps $28-40.

data.notes: Pair priced at $30 free shipping. Below cost of two new units (~$40-50), above low-ball 3-pack comps.

data.title: Hercules GSP38WB PLUS Wall Guitar Hangers Wood Base Short Arm - Pair
data.description:
Hercules makes some of the best wall hangers in the business, and the GSP38WB PLUS is their bread and butter model. The auto-grip yoke locks onto the guitar as you hang it and releases when you lift it off, no fumbling with levers. Wood base plate gives it a cleaner look than the steel base models. These are used but in excellent condition, ready to mount.

Brand | Hercules
Model | GSP38WB PLUS
Quantity | 2 hangers
Yoke | Auto-grip, swivels to accommodate any headstock angle
Base | Short arm, wood base plate
Fits | Guitar, bass, most stringed instruments
Condition | Used, excellent condition
Includes | Mounting hardware not guaranteed, buyer should have their own screws

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Used, excellent condition. Both hangers fully functional, auto-grip mechanism works correctly. No box.
